title: RumWebSocket
description: WebSocket-specific connection details. Only present when resource.type is 'websocket'

connection_id.description: UUID generated by the SDK at WebSocket construction time

handshake_succeeded.description: Whether the browser fired the WebSocket 'open' event for this connection

start_time.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the WebSocket connection opened

end_time.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the connection closed or was flushed

start_view_id.description: View ID where the WebSocket connection opened

end_view_id.description: View ID where the connection ended

tracking_end_reason.description: Why the SDK stopped tracking the connection

messages_in.description: Aggregated stats for incoming messages over the lifetime of the connection

messages_out.description: Aggregated stats for outgoing messages over the lifetime of the connection

time_to_first_message_in.description: Milliseconds from open to first incoming message

time_to_first_message_out.description: Milliseconds from open to first outgoing message

last_message_at.description: Unix timestamp (ms) of the last message (in or out)

longest_silence.description: Longest silence in milliseconds between consecutive messages

idle_duration_before_close.description: Silence duration in milliseconds before the connection closed

buffered_amount_max.description: Peak WebSocket.bufferedAmount (captured before sending a message) in bytes

protocol.description: Negotiated WebSocket sub-protocol from WebSocket.protocol once the connection is open

setup_duration.description: Duration in milliseconds from WebSocket construction until the connection opened or was rejected
